---
name: Feature request
about: Propose new functionality before writing code
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem are you trying to solve?

Describe the use case in concrete terms. "I'd like to do X" beats "the app should have Y".

## Proposed solution

What you think the app should do. Sketch the UX flow if it involves UI.

## Alternatives considered

What workarounds you tried, why they're not enough.

## Additional context

Screenshots, links to similar features in other tools, etc.
